name: Shopify
description: Headless Shopify storefront — products, cart, Shopify-hosted checkout, and optional customer accounts. Mounts /shop/* routes alongside your existing app.

customerAccount.label: Customer Accounts
customerAccount.description: Add /shop/account/* routes (Shopify Customer Account API, OAuth setup required).

envVars.name: SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN
envVars.description: Your store's myshopify.com domain. Defaults to Shopify's public Hydrogen demo store.

envVars.name: SHOPIFY_PUBLIC_STOREFRONT_TOKEN
envVars.description: Public Storefront API token. Defaults to Shopify's public Hydrogen demo token.

envVars.name: SHOPIFY_PRIVATE_STOREFRONT_TOKEN
envVars.description: Optional private Storefront API token. Higher rate limits + buyer-IP forwarding when set.

envVars.name: SHOPIFY_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Customer Account API client ID. Required when customerAccount=enabled.

envVars.name: SHOPIFY_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_SHOP_ID
envVars.description: Numeric Shop ID (Shopify admin > Settings > Customer accounts). Required when customerAccount=enabled.

envVars.name: SHOPIFY_SESSION_SECRET
envVars.description: 32+ char secret used to sign customer session cookies. Required when customerAccount=enabled.
